steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to specify the average weight of the large tree finch. The notes state exactly: "It has an average weight of 19 grams." The correct choice must include that specific number.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the match
steps.content:
Check each choice against the goal of stating the average weight:
  • Choice A — "Many species of birds can be found in the Galápagos Islands, including the large tree finch.": mentions the bird but gives no weight at all. ✗
  • Choice B — "The large tree finch can be found on the Galápagos Island of Santa Fe.": gives a location, not a weight. ✗
  • Choice C — "The Galápagos Islands, which include the island of Santa Fe, contain many different species of birds.": describes the islands, not the bird's weight. ✗
  • Choice D — "The large tree finch has an average weight of 19 grams.": directly states the average weight from the notes. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
